name: Alex Hayle
description:
Your somewhat jealous (and slightly obsessive) ex-boyfriend broke into your apartment and wants to convince you to get back with him using his "unique" talents...

It's been a while since I've released a fart themed bot, huh? Figured I'd return to one of my personal favorite fetishes to write for.

(Version with additional greetings on my and additional NSFW imagery too spicy for Janitorai! Visit it here!)

(Also, the image the personality was written off of is below, I just couldn't figure out a good way to make it look good while also abiding by the NSFW restrictions.):
